ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags indicating specific conditions or states during the function execution */,
  "source_locator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the source locator, which helps in identifying the origin of the log entry */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Correlation ID to link related log entries across different functions or threads */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the function being executed */,
  "pc_offset" INTEGER /* Program counter offset within the function */,
  "threads_executed" INTEGER /* Total number of threads executed */,
  "not_pred_off_threads_executed" INTEGER /* Number of threads executed that were not predicated off */,
  "executed" INTEGER /* Total number of times the function was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for the function execution */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the function execution */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the function execution */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code indicating any errors during the execution */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "machine_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the machine on which the function was executed */,
  "thread_execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for each thread execution */,
  "thread_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of each thread */,
  "thread_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of each thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, system admin, performance engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
